name: flight-price-analyzer
description: AI-powered flight price analysis desktop app

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:backend && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:backend:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.dist:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --win --config electron-builder.config.js
